CustomField.formula: If( AND(TEXT(PM_Review_Status__c) = 'Submitted', TEXT(Severity__c) = 'Blocker', Days_to_Accept__c >= 1 ), 'Not Touched - In Violation of SLA',If( AND(TEXT(PM_Review_Status__c) = 'Submitted', TEXT(Severity__c) = 'Major', Days_to_Accept__c >= 2 ), 'Not Touched - In Violation of SLA',If( AND(TEXT(PM_Review_Status__c) != 'Submitted', TEXT(Severity__c) = 'Blocker', Days_to_Accept__c >= 1 ), 'Not Touched - In Violation of SLA',If( AND(TEXT(PM_Review_Status__c) != 'Submitted', TEXT(Severity__c) = 'Major', Days_to_Accept__c >= 2 ), 'Not Touched - In Violation of SLA',If( TEXT(Severity__c) = 'Minor', 'No SLA','In Compliance')))))
CustomField.label: SLA First Touch
